rulings.Case Title: MARTHA HARPER et al VS. LINA ANN LAMB et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, April 7, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Exxon Mobil Corporation¿s demurrer to plaintiffs¿ first amended complaint for damages is overruled. Plaintiffs¿ first amended complaint states valid causes of action for conspiracy against Exxon. Plaintiffs have sufficiently pled that Exxon had a duty to plaintiffs, individually and not as a conspirator (Chavers v. Gatke Corp. (2003) 107 Cal.App.4th 606, 614), and that Exxon conspired to engage in wrongful acts that harmed plaintiffs (Applied Equipment Corp. v. Litton Saudi Arabia Ltd. (1994) 7 Cal.4th 503, 511). Exxon¿s objection to the late filing of plaintiffs¿ opposition is overruled. =(220/HEK)
